proved: Cloud Run rollback and forward recovery
portal-to-API kill switch and bounded IAM restoration

required_production_monitors: Android crash and ANR health after Play telemetry is available
verification queue age and approval-without-evidence invariants
immediate_stop_conditions: any unauthorized personal-data, evidence or private-location disclosure
any authentication or authorization bypass or cross-provider access
any evidence-backed claim published without required current evidence
any production secret or signing material exposure

candidate_technical_pause_thresholds.threshold: >=1% for 15 continuous minutes or >=5% in any 5-minute window
candidate_technical_pause_thresholds.action: pause rollout and investigate; rollback if release-correlated

candidate_technical_pause_thresholds.threshold: >10% over any rolling 20 completed/attempted production tasks
>25% of active cases older than 48 hours
>10 unresolved normal cases or oldest normal case >24 support hours during bounded launch

candidate_technical_pause_thresholds.action: pause demand expansion for affected scope

staged_rollout_candidate.promotion_gate: all mandatory gates green; no P0/P1 blocker

staged_rollout_candidate.minimum_observation: at least one full support/verification operating cycle and current Play eligibility requirements
staged_rollout_candidate.promotion_gate: structured feedback reviewed; crash/ANR/pre-launch findings acceptable; support capacity proven

staged_rollout_candidate.audience: only geography/categories authorized by launch decision

rollback_order: disable new admissions/intake using approved kill switches
rollback Android release where Play supports it by halting rollout and issuing a corrected higher-version release; never decrement versionCode
rollback backend traffic to last known-good immutable revision using floating-LATEST-safe procedure
revoke or rotate compromised secrets/keys if applicable
record incident, affected source/artifacts, decisions and recovery evidence
production_evidence_missing: production alert policies and notification routes active
real Android vitals baseline from internal/closed testing
boundary: Thresholds and stages are a release plan, not evidence that production monitoring, staffing or rollout has been activated.
